---
title: "JKW Annual PDF Viewer"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    css: styles.css
    embed-resources: true
---

# JKW Annual PDF Viewer

Use the viewer links below to open each PDF inside a browser page rather than on a GitHub file screen.

::: {.viewer-grid}
::: {.viewer-card}
## 2022 Annual Conference

::: {.viewer-links}
[Open viewer](2022/annual-conference.html){.viewer-link}
[Open PDF directly](2022/_2022_annual-conference.pdf){.viewer-link}
:::
:::

::: {.viewer-card}
## 2022 Article Edition

::: {.viewer-links}
[Open viewer](2022/article-edition.html){.viewer-link}
[Open PDF directly](2022/_2022_article-edition.pdf){.viewer-link}
:::
:::
:::
